title: Launch Punch List — 53 Items
desc: Everything needed to start the business: 29 items from Working Brief v2 not yet done + 24 items missing from the plan entirely. Categories: Legal & Regulatory, Product & Scope, Money & Finance, Payments, Operations, Brand, Marketing & Growth, Build & Tech, Launch Authority. Four items flagged Existential.

title: Compliance Launch Matrix Punch List — 19 Items
desc: A per-SKU compliance database: ten required answers (classification, approved & prohibited claims, evidence, processor eligibility, shipping restrictions, subscription approval, advertising restrictions, COA status, label status) plus design, upkeep, and build scope. Governing rule: no SKU enters Shopify until its matrix row is 10-for-10 complete. Build deferred — this list defines it.

title: SKU Contribution-Margin Model Punch List — 18 Items
desc: The per-SKU economics database: nine cost inputs (product, packaging, fulfillment, postage subsidy, processing, discounts, affiliate commissions, returns) → contribution margin at one-time and subscription pricing → LTV and CAC ceiling → margin floor decisions. Build deferred — this list defines it.

title: AEO Punch List — 22 Items
desc: Making the store the source AI search engines quote (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Claude). Five phases from crawler access to monthly citation checks. Two human decisions; everything else is AI-layer work. Critical path: the name decision.

title: Product & Business Facts Workbook (Excel — fill-in)
desc: The editable companion to the punch lists: Sheet 1 captures per-SKU product facts (working name, sector, form factor, active ingredients, dose, and more) for the launch candidates; Sheet 2 captures every business and finance fact the plan runs on — entity, ownership, budgets, unit economics — with a Your Answer column per line. Fill this in and most of the Launch Punch List's open items close.
